title: Pillowy Cozy Venezuelan Beef Casserole
description: This low-carb Venezuelan dish features ground cardomom and tadka for a rich umami flavor, making it a perfect cozy meal for any occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the ground cardamom and tadka spice blend to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the cauliflower rice, shredded cheese, sour cream, chopped cilantro, lime juice, salt, and black pepper, and cook until the cheese is melted and the mixture is well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the casserole hot, garnished with additional chopped cilantro if desired.
